prompt: Create a gritty flash-photography cyberpunk fashion editorial portrait of a young woman styled as a fictional Supreme x Ghost in the Shell Section 9 streetwear agent. She stands indoors in a dim concrete industrial corridor, framed from head to hips, looking down and to the left with a calm, introspective expression. She has pale skin and long straight black hair falling over one shoulder. She wears a fitted cropped black long-sleeve shirt with a red Supreme box logo across the chest, a small white cybernetic brain emblem above it, and a rectangular sleeve patch reading “SECTION 9 PUBLIC SECURITY” with small Japanese-style characters beneath. Add dark tactical wide-leg pants with a hanging ID badge, clips, and utility hardware at the waist. A transparent plastic umbrella strap or clear vinyl accessory crosses diagonally from her shoulder to her hand, with a black coiled cable detail near the shoulder for a techwear feel. The setting is moody and urban, with rough stained concrete walls, a large dark circular window or mirror on the right, deep shadows, visible film grain, harsh on-camera flash, slightly desaturated colors, and the candid look of a 1990s Japanese cyberpunk magazine photo. Keep the composition vertical, realistic, fashion-forward, understated, and cinematic.
